docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BERLIND, CURTIS W AS TO DEFENDANT JACOBSEN, MATT UPL ENTERPRISES LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-31-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $150.00 AS TO DEFENDANT JACOBSEN, MATT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-05-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT UPL ENTERPRISES LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-17-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-17-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CURTIS W BERLIND IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS MATT JACOBSEN AND UPL ENTERPRISES LLC ARE PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERLIND, CURTIS W AS TO DEFENDANT JACOBSEN, MATT UPL ENTERPRISES LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERLIND, CURTIS W RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACOBSEN, MATT UPL ENTERPRISES LLC $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,225.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
